notes:
NEMOTRON-OMNI MULTIMODAL + SWIFT MIGRATION BANNER + STAGE-2 NATIVE MLX OPT-IN.

HEADLINE: Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni multimodal HTTP dispatch — chat with images, audio, and video on the Omni MXFP4/JANGTQ4/JANGTQ2 bundles via the standard OpenAI, Anthropic, and Ollama chat APIs. Stage-1 PyTorch+MPS encoder bridge (default, bit-exact reference) or Stage-2 native MLX (VMLX_OMNI_BACKEND=stage2, ~17× faster RADIO + ~15× faster Parakeet — but with documented quality gaps still in upstream validation; default-off until Wave 4).

SWIFT v2 BANNER now surfaces at top of every screen pointing users at the Swift v2 engine (significantly faster: 50–95 t/s M-series vs 11–60 t/s on this Python build). Dismissible, persists in localStorage.

JANGTQ STREAM ISOLATION fix for the LLM + SimpleEngine paths — JANGTQ text bundles (Qwen3.6-A3B JANGTQ4, MiniMax-M2.7 JANGTQ, Kimi K2.6 JANGTQ, etc.) no longer crash uvicorn workers with 'Stream(gpu, N) in current thread' on /v1/chat/completions. Dedicated llm-worker_0 ThreadPoolExecutor mirrors the existing MLLM-side mllm-worker pattern.

NEMOTRON-OMNI TEXT SUPPORT — 4 engine fixes that prevented the new MXFP4/JANGTQ4/JANGTQ2 bundles from loading: jang_loader weight-format gate (treat weight_format=mlx as stock-MLX bundle), P18 NemotronHAttention skip in load_jangtq.py (uses num_heads not num_attention_heads), nemo_pat backbone-prefix expert pattern (TQ codec applies to backbone.layers.N.mixer.experts), strict=False fallback for spurious vision_model+sound_encoder weights in MXFP4 bundle.

BUG FIXES: mlxstudio#98 image hot-load standby fallback (no more 'No local model files found' after wake). vmlx#102/#116 DYLD env clearing kills brew-mlx-c collision (no more nanobind duplicate-key 'cpu' error). Reasoning parser closing-tag fallback handles deepseek_r1 templates that emit </think> without <think> opener.

API surface: OpenAI /v1/chat/completions accepts image_url + input_audio + video_url. Anthropic /v1/messages translates image content blocks. Ollama /api/chat translates images: [base64,...]. /health gains omni_multimodal: {bundle_compatible, backend, modalities} field.

CACHE INFRASTRUCTURE (stable): hybrid SSM 6/29 KV + SSM companion, TurboQuant KV 3-bit/4-bit critical, prefix cache + paged + L2 disk write-through, vmlx#109 inline-capture supersedes async re-derive (12 captures verified, 0 deferred re-derives). Sleep/wake (soft+deep) end-to-end. Stream/AttributeError/Traceback count: 0/0/0.

BUNDLED DEPS: tiktoken (Kimi K2.6), soundfile + libsndfile_arm64.dylib (Omni audio), timm + einops (Omni RADIO ViT), jang_tools.nemotron_omni package (radio/parakeet/audio_features/projectors/image_processor/video_processor/model). 9 new verify-bundled-python gates.

Update channels: GH release v1.4.0, latest.json 1.4.0, PyPI vmlx 1.4.0, engine __version__ 1.4.0, panel package.json 1.4.0.

Sister: Swift v2.0.0-beta.15 + native multimodal port (NemotronHOmni.swift + RADIOVision.swift + Parakeet.swift + shared VLMVideoUtils.swift). https://github.com/jjang-ai/vmlx/releases/tag/v2.0.0-beta.15
